case_title: JOSEPH SIMS III VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT CITY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT (VACATED PER 7/19/12 COURT ORDER)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

LAW AND MOTION, 302, THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT WAS FILED ON 7/16/12. THE ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT CITY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FILED ON JUNE 20, 2012 IS VACATED. COURT TO PREPARE THE ORDER VACATING THE 6/20/12 ORDER. Appearances:
Andrew M. Gschwind, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3973, appearing for defendant and moving party;
Joseph Sims, Tel. 415.596.4111, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf.

The court modified its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar. A first amended complaint was filed on 7/16/12. The Order Granting Defendant City's Demurrer to Complaint filed on June 20, 2012 is vacated. Court to prepare the order vacating the 6/20/12 order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
